expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The top navigation tab 'Hot Games' is visually cut off, displaying only 'Hot Ga...' without an ellipsis or tooltip, making it unclear what the tab label is.

Game cards on the right edge of both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially clipped (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUN...MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'). The truncated titles make them unreadable and unrecognizable.
There is no visible horizontal scrollbar or scroll indicator for the game carousels, leaving it unclear to users that horizontal scrolling is available to see more games.
The partially visible game thumbnails on the right side of each row (e.g., the third column) appear interactable but are difficult to tap or click reliably due to being cut off at the screen edge.

The jackpot amount displayed on 'Cop the Lot' ($6,264.35) and '3 Fiend Pots' ($13,015.06) use a small white font that has low contrast against some game thumbnail backgrounds, potentially reducing legibility.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a bottom navigation bar or Poker item highlighting problem; all reported issues concern top navigation, game card clipping, scrollbars, and contrast.
